summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was provided or inferred, low-signal closeout and merge/fix actions are disabled, and the preflight security boundary reports no security-sensitive items. All open PRs are classified independently for maintainer/backlog handling.

actions.reason: Standalone plugin runtime fix. Failed checks and disabled merge/fix actions rule out merge or fixed-by-candidate handling in this plan.

Large standalone UI/session-state PR needs ordinary maintainer review outside dedupe cleanup.

Small standalone docs/command-summary PR; dirty merge state prevents merge-style planning.

Standalone CLI/MCP stdout fix; no duplicate, superseding PR, or closeout basis is hydrated.
